channel.title: Francisco Obando | Staff Software Engineer
channel.description: Recent content on Francisco Obando | Staff Software Engineer

item.title: Handling the 'Thundering Herd': Solving Postgres Connection Spikes
item.description: How we solved database connection exhaustion in queue-based deployments by implementing controlled ramp-ups and pod-level circuit breakers.

item.title: AI-Driven E2E Testing: Mapping Blast Radius in Microservices
item.description: Building a centralized E2E testing source of truth using AI agents to map dependencies and prioritize tests for QA-gated production releases.

item.title: Scaling Python Quality: Linting and Type Checking with Ruff and Pyrefly
item.description: Implementing a tiered linting and typing strategy using Ruff, Pyrefly, and pre-commit to balance strict standards with developer flexibility.

item.title: Data Quality Infrastructure for MLOps
item.description: Implementing a robust data quality framework using OpenMetadata and AWS Cognito to ensure high-fidelity data for machine learning models.

item.title: When to Use Explicit 'depends_on' in Terraform
item.description: A lesson in why implicit dependencies aren’t always enough, especially when managing NLB targets for existing databases.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am an accomplished Staff Software Engineer with over 8 years of experience in designing and scaling complex data platforms, cloud architectures, and MLOps workflows. My expertise lies in building robust event-driven systems and optimizing infrastructure to drive efficiency, security, and reliability at scale.

Currently, I am at Laurel, where I lead software engineering initiatives to optimize and scale platform capabilities. Previously, I held key leadership and engineering roles at Preston Ventures, where I served as Director of MLOps and Senior Data Engineer, focusing on cloud cost optimization, high-availability medical data systems, and automated CI/CD security.

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Francisco Obando, M.Sc.

Staff Software Engineer
LinkedIn | GitHub | Email | 📄 Download PDF

Summary

Accomplished Software and Data Engineer with extensive experience designing scalable platforms, optimizing cloud infrastructures, and implementing event-driven architectures. Proven success in reducing operational costs, improving system reliability, and ensuring compliance with data governance and security standards. Adept at leading teams, driving cross-functional collaboration, and supporting machine learning and analytics use cases across cloud environments like AWS and GCP.
